overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a video game (Red Dead Redemption 2) showing a cowboy character walking along a mountain trail at night under stormy skies. The character transitions from an open ridge with distant valley views into an increasingly dense and enclosed forested path with rocky outcrops.

scene_state.functional_zone: open mountain ridge with valley overlook

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the mountain ridge overlooking distant valley lights under stormy skies

entered.detail: dark storm clouds covering the night sky with patches of lighter clouds
faint lights from a distant settlement visible in the valley below
rocky ground and boulders along the mountain ridge path
scattered pine trees visible on the left horizon

segments.scene_description: The character walks along an open mountain ridge at night, with storm clouds overhead and distant valley lights visible in the background. The terrain is rocky with sparse vegetation, creating a dramatic and isolated atmosphere.

scene_state.functional_zone: forest edge trail with rocky outcrops

events.description: entering forested area from open ridge, trees closing in on the left side of the path

agents.ego_description: continuing along the winding mountain path as the terrain becomes more enclosed by pine trees

entered.detail: large rocky outcrop and boulders lining the left side of the trail
narrow dirt path winding through the mountain terrain

segments.scene_description: The path transitions from the open ridge into a forested area, with pine trees moving closer on the left and rocky outcrops appearing. The distant valley lights disappear from view as the terrain becomes more enclosed, though storm clouds remain visible overhead.

scene_state.functional_zone: dense forest trail between rocky walls and trees

events.description: path becomes deeply enclosed by dense forest and rock walls on the left, sky mostly obscured

agents.ego_description: walking through the narrow forest path surrounded by dense dark trees and towering rock walls

entered.detail: tall rocky cliff face forming a wall on the left side of the path
rocky overhang extending over the path creating a sheltered feeling
sheer rock wall running parallel to the forest trail

segments.scene_description: The trail becomes deeply enclosed within a dense forest, with towering pine trees on both sides and massive rocky walls and overhangs on the left. The sky is mostly blocked by the forest canopy and rock formations, creating a dark, intimate atmosphere as the character continues walking through the narrow mountain path.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement along a mountain trail that transforms from an expansive, stormy ridge into a claustrophobic forest corridor. It begins on an open rocky ridge under heavy storm clouds, where distant valley lights are visible across a wide, isolated landscape. As the character advances, the path narrows and the distant lights fade from view while pine trees and rocky outcrops begin to crowd the left side of the frame. The scene then shifts into a deeply enclosed environment, with towering pines and massive rocky overhangs closing in from both sides. Finally, the forest canopy and stone walls almost entirely block the sky, leaving the character to navigate a dark and intimate mountain pass.
